overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest at night along a dirt trail. The scene is illuminated by a warm flashlight, revealing dense vegetation, trees, and eventually wooden trail markers along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, illuminating the way forward with a flashlight

entered.detail: thick green bushes and vegetation lining the left side of the trail
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest floor
tall tree trunks visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow forest trail at night. Dense undergrowth and bushes line the left side while the path ahead is illuminated by a warm light source, revealing tree trunks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path between large trees with rocky terrain

events.description: dense bushes on left give way to larger tree trunks, rocky embankment appears on right

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path between large trees, passing rocky terrain on the right

entered.detail: sloped rocky and sandy terrain rising on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail curves between larger trees with a rocky embankment now visible on the right side. The dense undergrowth from the previous section has thinned, revealing more of the forest floor and larger tree trunks closer to the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: marked forest trail with wooden posts

events.description: wooden trail markers appear on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail, passing wooden trail markers on the left

entered.detail: wooden posts and markers lining the left side of the trail
green vegetation and undergrowth covering the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the forest with wooden trail markers now prominently visible on the left side of the path. The rocky terrain has given way to dense vegetation on the right as the trail progresses deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest, moving from a narrow, overgrown trail into a more defined path marked by wooden signage. It begins by pushing through dense undergrowth and bushes on the left, with a warm light illuminating the dirt path and distant tree trunks. As the trail curves, the vegetation thins to reveal a rocky embankment on the right and larger, more imposing trees flanking the way. The scene then shifts as the rocky terrain gives way to thick greenery once more, while wooden trail markers emerge on the left to guide the camera deeper into the woods.
